actor_claims.quote_text: Under the merger agreement, Mac-Gray, its subsidiaries and their respective representatives are not permitted to (except under limited circumstances described below), among other things:

actor_claims.actor_label: Mac-Gray, its subsidiaries and their respective representatives
actor_claims.quote_text: Under the merger agreement, Mac-Gray, its subsidiaries and their respective representatives are not permitted to (except under limited circumstances described below), among other things:

provided Mac-Gray will promptly provide to Parent any material non-public information concerning Mac-Gray or its subsidiaries or access provided to such third party which was not previously provided to Parent.
if Mac-Gray receives an unsolicited bona fide acquisition proposal in writing from a third party after the date of the merger agreement

event_claims.actor_label: Mac-Gray, its subsidiaries and their respective representatives
event_claims.description: Mac-Gray, its subsidiaries and representatives are restricted from solicitation activities except under limited circumstances.
event_claims.quote_text: Under the merger agreement, Mac-Gray, its subsidiaries and their respective representatives are not permitted to (except under limited circumstances described below), among other things:

event_claims.description: Mac-Gray must immediately cease and terminate existing solicitation, encouragement, discussion or negotiation with any third party regarding an acquisition proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: Under the merger agreement, Mac-Gray will, and will cause its subsidiaries and representatives to, immediately cease and terminate any existing solicitation, encouragement, discussion or negotiation with any third party with respect to an acquisition proposal and request that all non-public information previously provided by or on behalf of Mac-Gray to any such third party be returned or destroyed.

event_claims.description: Before stockholder adoption, Mac-Gray may respond to an unsolicited bona fide written acquisition proposal from a third party received after the merger agreement date, subject to specified fiduciary and superior-proposal conditions.
event_claims.quote_text: prior to the adoption of the merger agreement by Mac-Gray stockholders, if Mac-Gray receives an unsolicited bona fide acquisition proposal in writing from a third party after the date of the merger agreement that did not, directly or indirectly, result from or arise out of a breach of the non-solicitation provisions of the merger agreement

event_claims.description: If the required conditions are met, Mac-Gray may furnish non-public information to the third party, provide access, and participate in discussions or negotiations.
event_claims.quote_text: then Mac-Gray may furnish to such third party non-public information relating to Mac-Gray pursuant to a confidentiality agreement meeting certain requirements as set forth in the merger agreement and afford such third party access to the businesses, properties, assets and personnel of Mac-Gray or any of its subsidiaries and enter into, maintain and participate in discussions or negotiations with such third party or otherwise cooperate with or assist or participate in, or facilitate, any such discussions or negotiations

event_claims.description: Mac-Gray must promptly provide Parent any material non-public information or access provided to the third party that Parent had not previously received.
event_claims.quote_text: provided Mac-Gray will promptly provide to Parent any material non-public information concerning Mac-Gray or its subsidiaries or access provided to such third party which was not previously provided to Parent.

event_claims.description: Mac-Gray may not provide commercially sensitive information to the third party except consistent with past practices and limitations placed on Parent and its representatives.
event_claims.quote_text: In addition, Mac-Gray will not provide to such third party commercially sensitive information except in a manner consistent with past practices and subject to any limitations placed on Parent and its representatives.
